summary: Comprehensive testing of FunzionaBene.it Passo 2 (Public Site). All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified including questionnaire, matching, therapist profile, booking with registration/OTP, booking with login, blog, and FAQ.
critical_code_review_comments: BlogPostPage.jsx fetches all articles via /api/public/blog then filters by ID client-side. Consider adding GET /api/public/blog/{id} endpoint for efficiency.
server.py is now 1043 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth.py, public.py, terapisti.py, etc.) for maintainability
seed_data_creation: Created test users during booking flow tests (test_booking_*, test_ui_*, test_otp_*, etc.) - these are TEST_ prefixed for cleanup

test_credentials.note: OTP is MOCKED - returned in otp_dev field of /auth/register and /auth/resend-otp responses

context_for_next_testing_agent: Passo 2 (Public Site) fully tested. All public routes work: /api/public/terapisti (returns autocertificazione_firmata=true only), /api/public/terapisti/{id}, /api/public/matching (returns top 3 with compatibilita %), /api/public/blog (stato=pubblicato only), /api/public/faq (ordered by ordine), /api/terapisti/{id}/slots (Italian day names in data_ora_fmt). Full booking flow works: questionnaire → matching → profile → slot selection → BookingSheet (review → auth → OTP → payment → success). Login alternative skips OTP for verified users. Payment is MOCKED (Nexi XPay not integrated). OTP email is MOCKED (otp_dev returned). Video call link is MOCKED (Daily.co not integrated).

test_results.backend_public_terapisti_profile: PASS - returns full profile with albo, formazione, bio, lingue, prezzo
test_results.backend_public_matching: PASS - returns max 3 therapists with compatibilita % sorted desc
test_results.backend_public_faq: PASS - returns ordered list (fallback FAQ if DB empty)
test_results.backend_slots: PASS - returns slots with data_ora, data_ora_fmt (Italian), disponibile flag
test_results.backend_booking_flow: PASS - register → OTP → profile → prenota creates appuntamento
test_results.frontend_homepage: PASS - hero, how-it-works, values, therapists preview, CTA band all present
test_results.frontend_navigation: PASS - all nav links work (Home, Questionario, Blog, FAQ, Accedi, CTA)
test_results.frontend_questionnaire: PASS - 5-step form, single-select auto-advances, multi-select requires Continua, progress bar updates
test_results.frontend_matching_results: PASS - shows 3 therapist cards with compatibility %, Visualizza profilo links work
test_results.frontend_therapist_profile: PASS - shows full profile (Albo, formazione, bio, lingue, prezzo) and slot grid
test_results.frontend_booking_sheet_register: PASS - review → auth (register default) → OTP → payment → success
test_results.frontend_booking_sheet_login: PASS - login tab works, skips OTP for verified users
test_results.frontend_blog: PASS - hero article + grid, links to individual posts
test_results.frontend_faq: PASS - accordion FAQ with 7 fallback items

mocked_apis.OTP_email: MOCKED - otp_dev field returned in API response
mocked_apis.Payment: MOCKED - Nexi XPay not integrated, mock card form shown
mocked_apis.Video_call: MOCKED - Daily.co not integrated, appuntamenti created without link_video
